title: MorphemeSet
description: Configuration defining a paradigm of morphemes (affixes, clitics or grammatical particles) exponing inflectional features.

source_path.description: The file path from which this config was loaded.

features.description: List of inflectional features this set expones.

data.description: An array over morphemes and associated feature vectors.

features.description: The feature value vector specified for this marker group.
